scripts.dev: concurrently -n app,admin,api,queue -c blue,green,red,yellow "npm run dev -w playground/app" "npm run dev -w playground/admin" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:queue"
scripts.dev:front: concurrently -n app,admin -c blue,green "npm run dev -w playground/app" "npm run dev -w playground/admin"
scripts.build: npm run build -w playground/app && npm run build -w playground/admin && npm run build -w plantilla/app && npm run build -w plantilla/admin
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check -w playground/app && npm run type-check -w playground/admin && npm run type-check -w plantilla/app && npm run type-check -w plantilla/admin
